2010June 6, 2010

🇺🇸 Bethlehem, PA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Bethlehem, United States, June 6, 2010 -- June 11, 2010

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2010-06-bethlehem-pennsylvania-usa

15 Resolutions

812Plenary
Manage ISO 22745 vocabulary as a database
SC 4 resolves to manage the ISO 22745 vocabulary using the ISO Annex ST procedures for the management of standards as databases, as customized in the SC 4 standing document “Procedure for the maint...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
810Plenary
Add modular APs to STEP Module and Resource Library (SMRL)
SC 4 approves the management of all ISO 10303 modular APs under the Annex ST procedure as part of the STEP Module and Resource Library. Snapshot builds of the APs shall be held in a separate direct...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
809Plenary
Circulate call for participation in Oil and Gas Asset Management PWI
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to circulate an immediate call to member bodies for participation in the PWI.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
808Plenary
Nominate WG 8 convener to Energy Efficiency Task Force
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 requests its Secretariat to nominate the convener of its JWG 8, Anne-Francoise Cutting-Decelle as the point of contact for the proposed ISO Strategic Advisory Group on Energy (SAG-E...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
807Plenary
Appoint delegates to TC 184 ad hoc group on mechatronics
SC 4 appoints Jean Brangé, Mike Zink, Tom Thurman, Peter Benson, and Gerry Radack as delegates to the TC 184 ad hoc group on mechatronics to ensure that effective use is made of existing SC 4 stand...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
806Plenary
Manage ISO 8000 vocabulary as a database
SC 4 resolves to manage the ISO 8000 vocabulary using the ISO Annex ST procedures for the management of standards as databases, as customized in the SC 4 standing document “Procedure for the mainte...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
805Plenary
Advance ISO 8000-1 to IS ballot and develop taxonomy of industrial data
SC 4 instructs its Secretariat to submit the revised version of ISO 8000-1 “Data Quality - Overview, principles and general requirements”, excluding the taxonomy, to ISO/CS for TS publication by 20...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
804Plenary
Withdraw ISO 8000-102 upon publication of ISO 8000-2
SC 4 directs the Secretariat to withdraw ISO 8000-102 “Master data: Exchange of Characteristic Data: Vocabulary”, upon publication of ISO 8000-2 “Data Quality - Vocabulary”.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
803Plenary
Appoint liaison from and to IAIDQ
SC 4 welcomes Christian Walenta as liaison from the International Association for Information and Data Quality (IAIDQ) for SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
802Plenary
Re-appoint SC 4 Officers for an additional three-year term
SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks for the exceptional dedication and service for the past three years of these Officers.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
801Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following changes to project leaders and project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Leader |Editor |ISO 10303-0026 |Keith Hunten |Marco Delgado |ISO 10303-02...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

Acclamation
SC 4 offers thanks to those external projects who presented their material at the Open Technical Forum: * "NWI for PDQ-S extension and quality guarantee process by the use of PDQ-S" -- Akihiko Ohta...

Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons and those projects who presented at the Liaison Plenary: * "Liaison Issues" -- Howard Mason * "ECCMA Update" -- Peter Benson * "CEN ELSSI-EMD" W...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 recognizes and thanks Ron Kolakowski for his years of hard work and the excellence of his support to the community while serving as an administrator in the SC 4 Secretariat. We wish him well i...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Mr. Peter Benson ECCMA, and his team for their hosting and support of the 59th ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at the Hotel Bethlehem in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania....
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
